name: Cascader

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected path of option values, from root to leaf (e.g. ["region", "state", "city"]). null or empty means nothing is selected.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Fired when the selected path changes — a leaf option is picked or the selection is cleared. Binding it makes Value controlled.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: The hierarchical option tree the cascader drills into, one column per level.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown in the trigger when nothing is selected. Defaults to the localized "Cascader.Placeholder" string.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the dropdown from opening.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: Shows a clear ("x") button in the trigger when a selection exists, letting the user reset Value to null in one click.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: Shows a search box at the top of the dropdown that filters the root column (and any column whose descendants match) by label.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, rendering an asterisk next to Label and setting aria-required on the trigger.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state on the trigger. Also set implicitly when a wrapping FormField reports a validation error.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true (and the cascader is not nested inside a FormField).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when there is no error (and the cascader is not nested inside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the trigger. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label instead.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The form field name, forwarded for consistency with other form controls (not rendered directly by this component).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger's wrapper div.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Fired when the selected path changes — a leaf option is picked or the selection is cleared. Binding it makes Value controlled.

mdSummary:
# Cascader

Multi-level dropdown for hierarchical selection.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/cascader

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Cascader | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Value | `List<string>?` | `` | The selected path of option values, from root to leaf (e.g. ["region", "state", "city"]). null or empty means nothing is selected. |
| Cascader | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<List<string>?>` | `` | Fired when the selected path changes — a leaf option is picked or the selection is cleared. Binding it makes Value controlled. |
| Cascader | Options | `List<CascaderOption>?` | `` | The hierarchical option tree the cascader drills into, one column per level. |
| Cascader | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Placeholder shown in the trigger when nothing is selected. Defaults to the localized "Cascader.Placeholder" string. |
| Cascader | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the trigger button, preventing the dropdown from opening. |
| Cascader | Clearable | `bool` | `false` | Shows a clear ("x") button in the trigger when a selection exists, letting the user reset Value to null in one click. |
| Cascader | ShowSearch | `bool` | `false` | Shows a search box at the top of the dropdown that filters the root column (and any column whose descendants match) by label. |
| Cascader | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field as required, rendering an asterisk next to Label and setting aria-required on the trigger. |
| Cascader | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid/error visual state on the trigger. Also set implicitly when a wrapping FormField reports a validation error. |
| Cascader | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true (and the cascader is not nested inside a FormField). |
| Cascader | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the field when there is no error (and the cascader is not nested inside a FormField). |
| Cascader | Label | `string?` | `` | Label rendered above the trigger. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label instead. |
| Cascader | Name | `string?` | `` | The form field name, forwarded for consistency with other form controls (not rendered directly by this component). |
| Cascader | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div. |
| Cascader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger's wrapper div. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<List<string>?>`) — Fired when the selected path changes — a leaf option is picked or the selection is cleared. Binding it makes Value controlled.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Cascader />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Cascader/Cascader.razor`
